html:
The Winter Hat is a wearable Dress item. It requires 4 Beefalo Wool and 4 Silk to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 50% of its durability.

It restores 1.33 Sanity per minute while worn.

It is a tier 2 warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. It has an insulation factor of 120.

The Winter Hat can be given to a Pig or Bunnyman to wear, which provides no effect. It will still lose durability while worn.

Downloadable Content

In the Hamlet DLC, Winter Hats can be bought for 10 Oincs at The Sow's Ear Hat Shop in the Pig City.

Trivia

  • The Winter Hat was added in the Long Live the Queen update.
  • The Winter Hat was used to start a snowing effect, with no practical use besides the visuals. This effect was removed as of A Winter's Tale update, when Winter became a feature. Its crafting description during this time was "There must be some magic in it...".
  • The Winter Hat used to cost 100 points under the old Research Points system. Adding it into a Science Machine or Alchemy Engine would give the player 10 points.
  • Klei Entertainment made a product themed after the winter hat. It also comes in dark grey and two versions of pink: one has a Klei logo, while the other has a Don't Starve logo. They all include codes to unlock the corresponding colored Winter Hat Skins in Don't Starve Together.
  • In Rhymes with Play Ep. 53, artist Kelly Graham stated that the hat's design is based on her father's hat from the 70s which she found in the basement.[1]

Assets

  • Dropped
  • Winter Hat Equipped

Gallery

  • A Winter Hat-wearing Wilson prominently featured in the A Winter's Tale update poster.
  • Winter Hat as seen in the poster for the Long Live the Queen! update.
  • Winter Hat as seen in the Winter promo for Reign of Giants.
  • Winter Hat as seen in the Winter's Feast update poster.
  • Winter Hat in the Winter's Feast update poster.
  • Blue Winter Hat replica.
  • Dark grey Winter Hat replica.
  • Pink Winter Hat replica with Klei logo.
  • Pink Winter Hat replica with Don't Starve logo.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Wilson wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Willow wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Wendy wearing a Winter Hat.
  • WX-78 wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Woodie wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Wes wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Maxwell wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Webber wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Walani wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Warly wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Wilbur wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Wilba wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Wormwood wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Wheeler wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Winona wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Wortox wearing a Winter Hat.
  • Wurt wearing a Winter Hat.

References

  1. ↑ Rhymes with Play Ep. 53 (14:14). Re-upload on YouTube.

The Winter Hat is a wearable Dress item. It requires 4 Beefalo Wool and 4 Silk to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 50% of its durability.
It restores 1.33 Sanity per minute while worn.
It is a tier 2 warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. It has an insulation factor of 120.
The Winter Hat can be given to a Pig or Bunnyman to wear, which provides no effect. It will still lose durability while worn.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In the Hamlet DLC, Winter Hats can be bought for 10 Oincs at The Sow's Ear Hat Shop in the Pig City.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Winter Hat was added in the Long Live the Queen update.
The Winter Hat was used to start a snowing effect, with no practical use besides the visuals. This effect was removed as of A Winter's Tale update, when Winter became a feature. Its crafting description during this time was "There must be some magic in it...".
The Winter Hat used to cost 100 points under the old Research Points system. Adding it into a Science Machine or Alchemy Engine would give the player 10 points.
Klei Entertainment made a product themed after the winter hat. It also comes in dark grey and two versions of pink: one has a Klei logo, while the other has a Don't Starve logo. They all include codes to unlock the corresponding colored Winter Hat Skins in Don't Starve Together.
In Rhymes with Play Ep. 53, artist Kelly Graham stated that the hat's design is based on her father's hat from the 70s which she found in the basement.[1]

The '''Winter Hat''' is a wearable [[Dress]] item. It requires 4 [[Beefalo Wool]] and 4 [[Silk]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 50% of its durability.

It restores 1.33 [[Sanity]] per minute while worn.

It is a ''tier 2'' warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the [[Winter]] before [[Freezing]]. It has an [[Freezing#Mechanics|insulation factor]] of 120.

The Winter Hat can be given to a [[Pig]] or [[Bunnyman]] to wear, which provides no effect. It will still lose durability while worn.
__NOTOC__
== {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==
In the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, Winter Hats can be bought for 10 [[Oinc]]s at [[The Sow's Ear Hat Shop]] in the [[Pig City]].

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Winter Hat was added in the ''[[Version History#Long Live the Queen|Long Live the Queen]]'' update.
* The Winter Hat was used to start a snowing effect, with no practical use besides the visuals. This effect was removed as of ''[[Version History#A Winter's Tale|A Winter's Tale]]'' update, when Winter became a feature. Its crafting description during this time was "''There must be some magic in it...''".
* The Winter Hat used to cost 100 points under the old [[Research Points List|Research Points]] system. Adding it into a Science Machine or Alchemy Engine would give the player 10 points.
* [[Klei Entertainment]] made a [https://shop.klei.com/product/dont-starve-winter-hat-replica-blue/ product] themed after the winter hat. It also comes in [https://shop.klei.com/product/dont-starve-winter-hat-replica/ dark grey] and two versions of pink: [https://shop.klei.com/product/dont-starve-winter-hat-klei-logo-version-2-0-pink/ one] has a Klei logo, while the [https://shop.klei.com/product/dont-starve-pink-winter-hat-replica/ other] has a ''Don't Starve'' logo. They all include codes to unlock the corresponding colored Winter Hat [[Skins]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''.
* In Rhymes with Play Ep. 53, artist Kelly Graham stated that the hat's design is based on her father's hat from the 70s which she found in the basement.<ref>[https://youtu.be/AHRN7cDZqbk?t=854 Rhymes with Play Ep. 53 (14:14)]. Re-upload on YouTube.</ref>
{{clear}}
